Cluster Effects

Performance-friendly effects for connected tile clusters

1. Pulse Border [LOW]
Box-shadow expands and contracts. Current implementation.
2. Glow Pulse [LOW]
Soft outer glow that breathes in and out.
3. Scale Breathe [LOW]
Tiles gently grow and shrink together.
4. Alpha Breathe [LOW]
Opacity pulses between semi and full.
5. Shimmer [MED]
Highlight sweeps across tiles.
6. Heartbeat [LOW]
Quick double-pulse like a heartbeat.
7. Hue Shift [MED]
Color shifts slightly through spectrum.
8. Dash Border [MED]
Rotating dashed border around tiles.
9. Neon Flicker [MED]
Electric neon glow with subtle flicker.
10. Wave [LOW]
Tiles bob up and down in sequence.
11. Ring Expand [LOW]
Rings expand outward from each tile.
12. Inner Glow [LOW]
Glow pulses from inside the tile.
13. Border Trace [HIGH]
Animated line traces around border.
14. Double Border [LOW]
Two concentric borders pulse.
15. Jelly [LOW]
Squash and stretch like jelly.
16. Corner Dots [MED]
Pulsing dots at tile corners.
COMBO: Glow Pulse + Jelly [LOW]
Both effects combined - glow breathes while tiles squash and stretch.
COMBO: Alpha Breathe + Wave [LOW]
Tiles fade in/out while bobbing up and down in sequence.
COMBO: Alpha Breathe + Jelly [LOW]
Tiles fade while squashing and stretching like breathing jelly.

Performance Notes

[LOW] = Simple transforms/opacity, runs at 60fps easily
[MED] = Uses filters or complex gradients, may impact mobile
[HIGH] = Complex CSS, use sparingly or simplify for PIXI

Best for PIXI.js: Glow Pulse, Scale Breathe, Alpha Breathe, Ring Expand, Double Border
